distDir.description: Paths of the static files that you wish to add to the destination directory

srcDir.description: Directory to output transpiled src files. Relative to destinationDir

staticFilesToIgnore.description: Static files to remove from the output

staticFilesToCopy.description: Static files to copy to output

babelConfig.description: relative path to babel config file

babelExtensions.description: array of extensions of files to compile with babel

babelIgnore.description: array of globs of files to ignore

typescriptConfig.description: relative path of the typescript config file
